ab: Mamaan saw ku remiad anini?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Sienaw ku remiad, pinanumi tu vaedetay a nanum.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Mamaan saw ku remiad anini?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Caledes ku remiad, adihayen ku nipinanum.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Mamaan saw ku remiad i hekal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Tataang ku cidal, kasitupertu.
ch: B:太陽很大，要記得戴帽子。
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Mamaan saw ku remiad i hekal?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Sikutemtu, awaay a mamelaw ku cidal.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: A mamaan hakiya ku remiad anucila?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Awaay ku cidal, sikutem, tataang ku vali anucila.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Namamaan saw ku remiad itiya a remiadan?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Sienaw itiya a remiad, kasiparaktu tu a tahekal.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: A mamaan hakiya ku remiad itiya i pahanhanan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Cahedalan ku remiad i pahanhanan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: A uradan hakiya itiya a remiadan?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Cahedalan ku remiad itiya a remiad, caay kauradan.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: A uradan hakiya itiya a remiadan?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Hay, a maurad i tiya a remiad.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Mauraday hen haw anini?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Masatereptu ku urad, masadak tu ku cidal.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Maurad hen haw anini?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Mauradaytu, caay kasicacevaren kaku.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Maurad haw i hekal?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Caay tu kauradan anini, a maurad i herek nu lahuk, kasicacevaren tu a tahekal.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: A sienaway hakiya ku kasienawan nu anucila a mihcaan?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: Hay, a sienaw i kasienawan nu anucila a mihecaan, tungalentu ku nikasivuduy.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: A caledes haw i kalaludan nu anini a mihecaan?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Hay, a caledes i kalaludan, adihayen ku nipinanum.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Maulah haw kisu tu kacanglahan?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: Hay, maulah kaku tu kacanglahan, dihekuway ku remiad.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Maulah haw kisu tu kasariwsiwan?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Caay kaulah kaku tu kasariwsiwan, adihay ku valiyus i kasariwsiwan.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
